brand.campaign: Tuyen dung nhan su hoa hoc
brand.role: Pha che - kiem tra - van hanh quy trinh san xuat
brand.tagline: Tong tim hop cho nganh hoa hoc, vat lieu va phong kiem nghiem

hero.headline: Moi truong thao tac chuan, sach va co quy trinh ro rang
hero.subheadline: Phu hop cho don pha che, van hanh, kiem tra chat luong va phong lab

companySection.title: Ten cong ty
companySection.intro: Cong ty hoat dong trong linh vuc vat lieu, hoa chat va kiem tra chat luong san pham.
bullets: Co the thay anh bang phong thi nghiem, day chuyen san xuat, vat lieu mau
Mau tim tao cam giac hien dai va nghien cuu
Phu hop cho poster can su tinh sach va ro net

jobSection.title: Noi dung cong viec
jobSection.intro: Danh sach cong viec co the bo sung them de phu hop voi tung quy trinh san xuat.
bullets: Ho tro pha che va canh chinh nguyen lieu
Kiem tra tinh trang san xuat va thong so co ban
Lay mau va ghi nhan ket qua
Ve sinh khu thao tac va tuan thu quy tac an toan

cards.title: Khu thao tac sach
cards.description: Moi truong thao tac gon gang, yeu cau can than va chuan xac.

cards.title: Co hoi hoc nghe
cards.description: Co the hoc them ve vat lieu, quy trinh va tieu chuan chat luong.

growthSection.title: Dinh huong phat trien sau khi vao cong ty

steps.title: Lam quen
steps.description: Hoc quy trinh va an toan

steps.title: Phoi hop
steps.description: Ho tro thao tac va ghi nhan

steps.title: On dinh
steps.description: Tu kiem tra cac muc co ban

steps.title: Nang cao
steps.description: Hieu sau hon ve quy trinh

traits.title: Ung vien phu hop
bullets: Thich cong viec co quy trinh

majorSection.title: Chuyen nganh tuyen dung
notes: Neu can poster manh hon, co the doi style tong sang bold.
